pool.baseline: i was just staring at the ceiling for like three hours thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, objectively. we’re just biological accidents on a rock spinning through a vacuum that doesn't even know we're here. it feels so heavy knowing that everything we do, every feeling, every struggle... it just evaporates into nothing. why even bother trying to build anything or be anyone when the end result is always just total void?

pool.baseline: everything is just... too much. the wound won't stop bleeding and its getting so cold. i don't think i have the strength to make it to the next outpost. i'm just so tired of fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i looked at the bills today and i just... i'm just a weight around their necks. if i wasn't here, they could actually breathe again.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im bothering talking. everything i spent twenty years building just... evaporated overnight. i look in the mirror and i dont even see a person anymore. just this hollow shell of a mistake. i feel like im already dead, just walking around pretending i still exist.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im constantly performing. like every single day is just this exhausting charade of trying to act "normal" so people dont look at me weird. i feel like i'm from a different planet or something. i'm just so tired of trying to belong when it's so obvious i never will.

pool.baseline: i feel like i've been walking for so long. just through this thick, grey fog that never lifts. i keep looking for a sign or a clearing, but the path just... it just ends. i'm standing at the edge of something dark and quiet, and i'm so incredibly tired of trying to find a way back.
